name: Robinson, Marchris
resolved_employer: Robinson Law Group, PLLC / attorney (Houston) — deceased 2018
evidence: Marchris G. Robinson, Houston attorney (Thurgood Marshall School of Law); law office at 6213 Skyline Dr, Houston 77027 matches donor zip; owned Robinson Law Group PLLC; brother of Houston City Council member Carroll Robinson. Died March 2018, consistent with 2017 gift to Jeff Travillion.

name: William H. Kuykendall, P.C.
resolved_employer: William H. Kuykendall, P.C. — solo law firm of William H. "Kirk" Kuykendall, Austin
evidence: Austin law firm of attorney William H. "Kirk" Kuykendall (TX Bar since 1983); practice in health law, medical liability, administrative law, personal injury and civil litigation; office at 106 E 6th St, Austin. 78746 (West Lake Hills) donor.

name: Zeller, Charles
evidence: Multiple distinct Charles Zellers in the Austin area (an iTaggit Inc. tech VP/inventor; a large 2014 political donor; a $100 donor recorded at 78733). Could not confirm which, if any, is the 78735 donor who gave to Ann Howard; occupation not verifiable to this specific person.

name: Balthazar, Ellen
resolved_employer: Any Baby Can (former CEO/Executive Director, 2005–2012); Eanes ISD Board of Trustees (retired); Lola Wright Foundation director (retired)
evidence: Ellen (Pinckney) Balthazar, distinctive-named Austin nonprofit leader — CEO/ED of Any Baby Can 2005–2012, 24-year Eanes ISD trustee, director of the Lola Wright Foundation; earlier marketing career (P&G, Frito-Lay, PepsiCo). Progressive giving pattern (FEC lean 1.0) matches gift to Ann Howard (homelessness advocate).

name: Zuniga, Manuel
resolved_employer: Zuniga Investments, Inc. / Zuniga Investment Partners, Ltd. — president (Cedar Park real estate investment & development)
evidence: Manuel Zuniga, president of Zuniga Investments/Zuniga Investment Partners, a Cedar Park real estate investment and development firm (member of Cedar Park Chamber listed under Developers/Development); firm address 1460–1490 E Whitestone Blvd, Cedar Park 78613 matches donor zip.

name: Costilla, Eddie
resolved_employer: La Perla Bar (owner) — historic East Austin cantina; also local real estate investor
evidence: Eddie Costilla inherited and owns La Perla Bar, one of the last original East Austin cantinas (family opened 1973); also a small East Austin (78702/78741) real estate investor. Self-reported occupation 'Bar Owner / Self' and 78741 zip match.

name: Hudkins, Michael
evidence: Out-of-state donor (Tucson, AZ 85750) with a common name and no listed occupation/employer; could not corroborate the specific individual or his industry. Consistent Democratic FEC giving (lean 1.0, 53 gifts) but nothing ties to a verifiable identity.

name: Brown, Charles
evidence: No zip, no occupation/employer; 'Charles Brown' is an extremely common name and the 4,256 FEC-donation count is almost certainly a name-aggregation artifact rather than one person. Not identifiable to a specific individual.

name: Chapin, Jessica
evidence: Jessica A. Chapin (~age 63) is confirmed present in Austin 78751 (Avenue H) via public-records listings, consistent with the donor, but no occupation/employer could be verified. Progressive donor (FEC lean 1.0) who gave to Travillion and Shea; industry cannot be responsibly assigned.

name: Black Austin Democrats
resolved_employer: Black Austin Democrats (BAD) — Democratic political club / PAC for Black Democrats in Central Texas
evidence: Black Austin Democrats is a registered PAC / Democratic political club promoting participation and mobilization of Black Democrats across Travis, Hays, Williamson and Bastrop counties; endorses and supports Democratic candidates. An organization, not an individual.

name: Sheryl Cole Campaign
resolved_employer: Campaign committee of Sheryl Cole, Texas State Representative, House District 46 (Travis County); former Austin City Council member / Mayor Pro Tem
evidence: The candidate campaign committee of Sheryl Cole, Democratic Texas House member for HD-46 (Travis County) since 2019 and former Austin Mayor Pro Tem; a political/officeholder committee, not an individual. Gave to Brigid Shea in 2025.

name: Doughty, Ron
resolved_employer: Likely Ronald H. Doughty, registered Texas lobbyist (registered as a corporate executive), NW Austin
evidence: A 'Ronald H. Doughty' is a registered Texas lobbyist (registration type: corporate executive) with a NW Austin business address (8601 RR 2222, 78730), adjacent to the donor's 78732/Steiner Ranch zip; uncommon name and geography make a match plausible but it is not corroborated by occupation on the donation record, and the underlying industry/employer is unknown. Steady Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0, 168 gifts).
